summary: Frontend testing complete for iteration 80. All new features verified: Custom SVG Bot Performance Chart with green gradient fill, Y-axis dollar labels, X-axis time labels, Stats row (Trades, Win Rate, Open, Unrealized, Realized, Best, Worst), Time range buttons (Today/Week/Month/YTD/All), In-Trade Guidance section in Bot's Brain with TARGET ZONE|HIVE alert, clicking guidance alert opens ticker modal with full features. Order Pipeline regression (pending→executing→filled) PASSED. Position card click modal regression verified from previous iteration.

minor.issue: Returns 503 when IB Gateway offline - expected behavior

console_warnings.warning: React ref warning in AnimatePresence/PopChild component
console_warnings.note: Function components cannot be given refs - should use React.forwardRef() in ThoughtEntry

features_verified.custom_svg_bot_performance_chart: PASS - Custom SVG chart with green gradient area fill (no TradingView dependency)
features_verified.x_axis_time_labels: PASS - Shows 01:58 PM, 03:57 PM, 04:45 PM format

time_range_buttons.today: PASS - Today button visible and active (cyan)
time_range_buttons.week: PASS - Week button visible and clickable
time_range_buttons.month: PASS - Month button visible and clickable
time_range_buttons.ytd: PASS - YTD button visible and clickable
time_range_buttons.all: PASS - All button visible and clickable

features_verified.bots_brain_panel: PASS - BOT'S BRAIN header with 'What I'm thinking right now' subtitle
features_verified.order_pipeline_regression: PASS - Shows ORDERS: 0 pending → 0 executing → 28 filled
features_verified.in_trade_guidance_section: PASS - IN-TRADE GUIDANCE section visible in Bot's Brain panel
features_verified.guidance_alert_target_zone: PASS - TARGET ZONE | HIVE alert with message 'HIVE is 2.8% from target. Consider scaling out.'
features_verified.guidance_alert_click_opens_modal: PASS - Clicking TARGET ZONE alert opens HIVE ticker modal

ticker_modal_features.buy_short_buttons: PASS - Buy HIVE and Short HIVE buttons visible
ticker_modal_features.ai_recommendation: PASS - Strong BEARISH bias, Score: 60/100 (B), SELL

features_verified.position_card_click_modal_regression: PASS - Position cards with data-testid work (verified from iteration 79)

critical_code_review_comments: BotPerformanceChart.jsx correctly implements CustomEquityChart with SVG gradient fill
InTradeGuidance component properly analyzes openTrades for near stop (2%), near target (3%), big winner (5%+), underwater (3%+)
Guidance alerts are clickable and use onTickerClick prop to open modal
TimeRangeButton component properly handles active state with cyan background
Stats row displays all 7 metrics: Trades, Win Rate, Open, Unrealized, Realized, Best, Worst
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live bot data

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real backend endpoints

context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 80 verified: Custom SVG Bot Performance Chart (no TradingView), In-Trade Guidance alerts (TARGET ZONE, RUNNING, UNDERWATER, STOP WARNING), guidance click opens ticker modal. Time range buttons work. Order Pipeline regression passed. Minor React ref warning in ThoughtEntry component (cosmetic). Position data varies based on IB connection status.
